# scripts/insur_bot.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-02T10:00:05Z

## Purpose
insur_bot — chat over the end-to-end demo index.

Modes:
  python insur_bot.py ask "your question"        # one-shot CLI
  python insur_bot.py repl                       # interactive CLI
  python insur_bot.py serve [--port 8001]        # FastAPI HTTP + UI

Uses artifacts produced by scripts/end_to_end_demo.py under
data/eval/end_to_end/latest/ (vector + bm25 + graph).

Per §38: every /bot/ask call writes an audit row.
Per §42: read-only over local indexes; no external calls except Ollama.
Per CLAUDE.md security: NO innerHTML — chat UI uses textContent + DOM.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import argparse
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import os
- from `_` import sys
- from `_` import time
- from `_` import uuid
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `typing` import Any
- from `_` import requests

## Inputs
- CLI args: --port
- Env vars: INSUR_EMBED_MODEL, INSUR_LLM_MODEL, OLLAMA_URL

## Process
### Functions
- `latest_run()`: (no docstring)
- `load_indexes(run_dir)`: (no docstring)
- `embed(text)`: (no docstring)
- `vector_search(chroma_dir, query, k)`: (no docstring)
- `bm25_search(bm25_data, query, k)`: (no docstring)
- `graph_neighbors(graph_data, query, k)`: (no docstring)
- `build_context(query, idx, k)`: (no docstring)
- `llm_answer(query, ctx)`: (no docstring)
- `write_audit(req_id, query, ctx, answer, latency_ms)`: (no docstring)
- `answer_query(query, idx)`: (no docstring)
- `serve(port)`: (no docstring)
- `main()`: (no docstring)

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above
